evals.prompt: We want to use BMAD for an AI workflow, but we still need to decide whether LangGraph or Deep Agents fits better.
evals.expected_output: Routes first to framework-selection inside a BMAD analysis or planning lane.
assertions: Response mentions framework-selection as the next move
Response treats this as BMAD routing plus framework choice
Response does not jump straight to implementation-only skills

evals.prompt: Our PRD is approved. What should come next in BMAD for a LangGraph system that needs durable execution?
evals.expected_output: Routes to solutioning or architecture with langgraph-fundamentals plus langgraph-persistence.
assertions: Response keeps BMAD phase progression explicit

evals.prompt: Brainstorm three agent product ideas before we choose any framework.
evals.expected_output: Routes out of langchain-bmad and into bmad-idea.
assertions: Response explains that framework selection is premature
Response avoids dumping the LangChain skill catalog

evals.prompt: The architecture is done. We need HITL approval and persistence in our LangGraph app.
evals.expected_output: Hands implementation off to the narrow LangGraph skills instead of re-explaining BMAD.
assertions: Response treats BMAD as the artifact-tracking layer rather than the implementation surface
